ui.label: Adaptive Sync
ui.tooltip_md: Adaptive sync technology: FreeSync, FreeSync Premium, FreeSync Premium Pro, G-Sync, G-Sync Compatible, G-Sync Ultimate

ui.label: Aspect Ratio
ui.tooltip_md: Display aspect ratio (e.g. 16:9, 21:9, 32:9, 16:10)

ui.label: Audio Output
ui.tooltip_md: Audio output type (3.5mm, SPDIF, optical)

ui.label: Backlight Type
ui.tooltip_md: Backlight technology: WLED edge-lit, WLED direct-lit, Mini-LED, none (OLED)

ui.label: Base Model
ui.tooltip_md: Base model without variant suffix

ui.label: Black Uniformity
ui.tooltip_md: Measured black uniformity or luminance deviation across the screen.

ui.label: Brand
ui.tooltip_md: Manufacturer brand name

ui.label: Peak HDR Brightness
ui.tooltip_md: Peak HDR brightness in nits (measured)

ui.label: Brightness (SDR)
ui.tooltip_md: Typical SDR peak brightness in nits (cd/m²)

ui.label: Cable Length
ui.tooltip_md: Included cable length in mm

ui.label: Cable Type
ui.tooltip_md: Type of included cables

ui.label: Cables Included
ui.tooltip_md: Cables and accessories included in the box

ui.label: Category
ui.tooltip_md: Product category

ui.label: Color
ui.tooltip_md: Available chassis/body color options

ui.label: Color Accuracy (ΔE)
ui.tooltip_md: Average color error measured as Delta E (lower is better)

ui.label: Adobe RGB Coverage
ui.tooltip_md: Adobe RGB color gamut coverage percentage

ui.label: DCI-P3 Coverage
ui.tooltip_md: DCI-P3 color gamut coverage percentage

ui.label: sRGB Coverage
ui.tooltip_md: sRGB color gamut coverage percentage

ui.label: Contrast Ratio
ui.tooltip_md: Static contrast ratio (e.g. 1000:1, 3000:1, Infinite for OLED)

ui.label: Dynamic Contrast Ratio
ui.tooltip_md: Dynamic contrast ratio (marketing spec, not measured)

ui.label: Crosshair Overlay
ui.tooltip_md: Built-in on-screen crosshair/aim-point overlay for gaming

ui.label: Curve Radius
ui.tooltip_md: Curvature radius in R (e.g. 1000R, 1500R, 1800R)

ui.label: Curved
ui.tooltip_md: Whether the display is curved

ui.label: Daisy Chain (DP Out)
ui.tooltip_md: DisplayPort output for daisy-chaining multiple monitors

ui.label: Depth
ui.tooltip_md: Depth/thickness of the monitor without stand in mm

ui.label: Discontinued
ui.tooltip_md: Whether the product is discontinued

ui.label: Display Stream Compression
ui.tooltip_md: Display Stream Compression support or stated DSC revision.

ui.label: DisplayPort
ui.tooltip_md: DisplayPort count and version (e.g. 1x DP 1.4, 1x DP 2.1)

ui.label: DisplayPort Version
ui.tooltip_md: Highest supported DisplayPort specification revision (for example DisplayPort 1.4a or 2.1).

ui.label: Energy Rating
ui.tooltip_md: Energy efficiency rating or Energy Star certification

ui.label: Ethernet / RJ45
ui.tooltip_md: Integrated Ethernet uplink capability and stated LAN speed.

ui.label: Factory Calibrated
ui.tooltip_md: Whether the monitor ships factory-calibrated with dE < 2

ui.label: Flicker-Free
ui.tooltip_md: Whether the backlight is flicker-free (DC dimming)

ui.label: Flicker Frequency
ui.tooltip_md: Measured pulse-width modulation or image flicker frequency.

ui.label: FRC (Dithering)
ui.tooltip_md: Frame Rate Control dithering to simulate higher bit depth

ui.label: Gradient Handling
ui.tooltip_md: Assessment of the panel's ability to render smooth gradients without banding.

ui.label: Gray Uniformity (50%)
ui.tooltip_md: Measured gray uniformity around a 50% gray window.

ui.label: GTIN / UPC
ui.tooltip_md: Global Trade Item Number / UPC barcode

ui.label: HDMI Ports
ui.tooltip_md: HDMI port count and version (e.g. 2x HDMI 2.1)

ui.label: HDMI Version
ui.tooltip_md: Highest supported HDMI specification revision (for example HDMI 2.0 or HDMI 2.1a).

ui.label: HDR Support
ui.tooltip_md: HDR standards supported: HDR10, HDR10+, Dolby Vision, DisplayHDR 400/600/1000/1400

ui.label: Headphone Jack
ui.tooltip_md: Whether the monitor has a 3.5mm headphone output

ui.label: Height
ui.tooltip_md: Height of the monitor without stand in mm

ui.label: Height Adjustment
ui.tooltip_md: Height adjustment range in mm (e.g. 130mm, 0-150mm)

ui.label: Height (With Stand)
ui.tooltip_md: Total height with stand at lowest position in mm

ui.label: Horizontal Viewing Angle
ui.tooltip_md: Measured horizontal viewing angle before notable color or luminance shift.

ui.label: Input Lag
ui.tooltip_md: Total input lag in ms (measured end-to-end signal delay)

ui.label: Input Lag (120 Hz)
ui.tooltip_md: Measured input lag at 120 Hz.

ui.label: Input Lag (60 Hz)
ui.tooltip_md: Measured input lag at 60 Hz.

ui.label: Input Lag (Max Refresh)
ui.tooltip_md: Measured input lag at the monitor's maximum supported refresh rate.

ui.label: KVM Switch
ui.tooltip_md: Built-in KVM switch for multi-computer control

ui.label: Local Dimming Zones
ui.tooltip_md: Number of local dimming zones (for FALD / Mini-LED backlight)

ui.label: Low Blue Light
ui.tooltip_md: Built-in blue light reduction / eye care mode

ui.label: macOS Compatibility
ui.tooltip_md: Practical compatibility status with macOS systems and common Apple workflows.

ui.label: Material
ui.tooltip_md: Chassis/body material

ui.label: Max Refresh Rate (DisplayPort)
ui.tooltip_md: Maximum refresh rate achievable over DisplayPort.

ui.label: Max Refresh Rate (HDMI)
ui.tooltip_md: Maximum refresh rate achievable over HDMI.

ui.label: Microphone
ui.tooltip_md: Integrated microphone presence or array type.

ui.label: Model
ui.tooltip_md: Full model name/number

ui.label: Motion Blur Reduction
ui.tooltip_md: Backlight strobing for motion clarity (ELMB, DyAc, ULMB, BFI)

ui.label: MPN
ui.tooltip_md: Manufacturer Part Number

ui.label: Native Colors
ui.tooltip_md: Number of displayable colors in millions (e.g. 16.7M, 1.07B)

ui.label: OSD Control
ui.tooltip_md: OSD control method: buttons, joystick, touch-sensitive, remote

ui.label: Overdrive
ui.tooltip_md: Whether overdrive/response time boost is available

ui.label: Overshoot (120 Hz)
ui.tooltip_md: Measured overshoot or inverse ghosting at 120 Hz.

ui.label: Overshoot (60 Hz)
ui.tooltip_md: Measured overshoot or inverse ghosting at 60 Hz.

ui.label: Overshoot (Max Refresh)
ui.tooltip_md: Measured overshoot or inverse ghosting at the monitor's maximum refresh rate.

ui.label: Panel Bit Depth
ui.tooltip_md: Native panel bit depth: 6-bit, 8-bit, 10-bit

ui.label: Panel Coating
ui.tooltip_md: Panel surface coating: matte, glossy, semi-glossy, anti-glare

query_templates: {brand} {model} panel part number AUO LGD BOE Innolux

ui.label: Panel Manufacturer
ui.tooltip_md: Panel manufacturer (LG Display, AU Optronics, BOE, Samsung Display, Innolux)

ui.label: Panel Type
ui.tooltip_md: Panel technology: IPS, VA, TN, OLED, QD-OLED, W-OLED, Mini-LED IPS, etc.

ui.label: PiP / PbP
ui.tooltip_md: Picture-in-Picture / Picture-by-Picture multi-source display

ui.label: Pivot / Portrait
ui.tooltip_md: Whether the stand supports 90° pivot rotation for portrait mode

ui.label: Pixel Density
ui.tooltip_md: Pixels per inch

ui.label: Power Consumption (Max)
ui.tooltip_md: Maximum power consumption in watts

ui.label: Power Consumption (Typical)
ui.tooltip_md: Typical power consumption in watts

ui.label: Price (MSRP)
ui.tooltip_md: MSRP / launch retail price in USD

ui.label: PS5 Compatibility
ui.tooltip_md: Compatibility status with PlayStation 5, including common console display modes.

ui.label: Reflections
ui.tooltip_md: Measured total reflections as a percentage of incident light.

ui.label: Refresh Rate
ui.tooltip_md: Maximum native refresh rate in Hz

ui.label: Release Date
ui.tooltip_md: Product release/launch date

ui.label: Resolution
ui.tooltip_md: Native resolution as WxH (e.g. 2560 x 1440, 3840 x 2160)

ui.label: Response Time (120 Hz)
ui.tooltip_md: Measured average response time when the display runs at 120 Hz.

ui.label: Response Time (60 Hz)
ui.tooltip_md: Measured average response time when the display runs at 60 Hz.

ui.label: Response Time (GtG)
ui.tooltip_md: Gray-to-gray response time in ms (manufacturer-stated)

ui.label: Response Time (MPRT)
ui.tooltip_md: Moving Picture Response Time in ms (measured motion clarity)

ui.label: Screen Size
ui.tooltip_md: Diagonal screen size in inches (e.g. 27, 31.5, 34)

ui.label: SKU / Part #
ui.tooltip_md: Manufacturer SKU or part number

ui.label: Speakers
ui.tooltip_md: Built-in speakers (e.g. 2x 2W, 2x 5W, None)

ui.label: Subpixel Layout
ui.tooltip_md: Subpixel arrangement: RGB, BGR, WRGB, RWBG

ui.label: Swivel Range
ui.tooltip_md: Swivel adjustment range (e.g. -45° to 45°)

ui.label: Text Clarity
ui.tooltip_md: Overall text clarity assessment for desktop use.

ui.label: Thunderbolt Ports
ui.tooltip_md: Thunderbolt port count exposed by the monitor.

ui.label: Thunderbolt Version
ui.tooltip_md: Supported Thunderbolt generation (for example Thunderbolt 3, 4, or 5).

ui.label: Tilt Range
ui.tooltip_md: Tilt adjustment range (e.g. -5° to 20°)

ui.label: USB-C Ports
ui.tooltip_md: USB-C port count, alt mode, and power delivery wattage

ui.label: USB Hub
ui.tooltip_md: Built-in USB hub port count and version (e.g. 4x USB 3.0)

ui.label: USB-C Power Delivery
ui.tooltip_md: USB-C Power Delivery wattage for laptop charging

ui.label: Variable Refresh Rate
ui.tooltip_md: Whether the monitor supports variable refresh rate

ui.label: Variant
ui.tooltip_md: Variant identifier (size, region, revision)

ui.label: Vertical Viewing Angle
ui.tooltip_md: Measured vertical viewing angle before notable color or luminance shift.

ui.label: VESA Mount
ui.tooltip_md: VESA mount pattern (e.g. 100x100, 200x200, 75x75, None)

ui.label: VRR Range
ui.tooltip_md: Variable refresh rate range in Hz (e.g. 48-165 Hz)

ui.label: Wall Mountable
ui.tooltip_md: Whether the monitor is wall-mountable

ui.label: Warranty
ui.tooltip_md: Manufacturer warranty period

ui.label: Webcam
ui.tooltip_md: Integrated webcam capability or headline resolution.

ui.label: Weight (With Stand)
ui.tooltip_md: Weight with stand in grams

ui.label: Weight (Without Stand)
ui.tooltip_md: Weight without stand in grams

ui.label: Wide Color Gamut
ui.tooltip_md: Whether the monitor supports wide color gamut (typically >90% DCI-P3)

ui.label: Width
ui.tooltip_md: Width of the monitor without stand in mm

ui.label: Xbox Series X|S Compatibility
ui.tooltip_md: Compatibility status with Xbox Series X and Series S display modes.

boolean_yes_no_unk.description: Parse yes/no/true/false/1/0 tokens. Output boolean or 'unk'.

component_reference.description: Match a component entity name/alias against a component_db type; output canonical component name.

date_field.description: Parse date strings to ISO-8601 (YYYY-MM-DD) when possible.

list_numbers_or_ranges_with_unit.description: Parse mixed lists containing numbers and ranges (e.g. '1-3, 4'). Canonical output is list of intervals {min,max}.

list_of_numbers_with_unit.description: Parse list of numbers with optional unit into list<number> (or list<int>) in target unit.

list_of_tokens_delimited.description: Parse delimited tokens into list<string> with optional token_map normalization.

number_with_unit.description: Parse a single number with optional unit. Convert to target unit when allowed.

url_field.description: Parse and validate URL. Normalize by trimming and ensuring scheme.

data_values.notes: Observed values across products; can be used for suggestion/inference but not strict enums.

field_catalog.notes: Column B holds field keys; columns C+ hold product values.
